title: dryopteris affinis var. splendens
intro: Dryopteris affinis var. splendens, also known as the golden buckler fern, is a variety of the Dryopteris affinis plant, a species of fern native to Asia and Europe. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as arthritis, gout, and digestive issues. The health benefits of golden buckler fern include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy. Golden buckler fern is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by drying and processing the leaves of the plant.
